products.name: ANELLO Aerial INS
products.descriptor: 3-axis optical gyro INS for UAVs and VTOLs in GPS-denied environments

evidence.snippet:
### ANELLO AERIAL INS
High-Performance INS for Autonomous Aerial Operations In GPS-Denied Environments

*   Reference-grade 100Hz position, velocity and attitude
*   3-axis SiPhOG™ with < 0.5º/hr unaided heading drift
*   Dual triple-frequency GNSS receivers
*   Resilience in heavy shock and vibration environments
*   Highly accurate dead reckoning solution for GNSS-denied navigation
*   ANELLO AI Sensor Fusion Engine with GNSS spoofing detection
*   Compact and lightweight design with low power consumption < 6 W

products.name: ANELLO X3 IMU
products.descriptor: World's smallest 3-axis optical gyro IMU for aerial and maritime platforms

evidence.snippet:
### ANELLO X3 IMU
Ultra-Compact 3-Axis Optical Gyro IMU
for Aerial and Maritime Missions
INTRODUCTION
------------
The ANELLO X3 IMU is world's smallest and lightest 3-Axis high performance optical gyroscope IMU.

*   Integrated with PX4 & ArduPilot
*   < 0.03 m/s/√hr Accel VRW
*   < 0.5°/hr Gyro Bias Instability
*   < 0.05°/√hr Angular Random Walk
*   Fully Calibrated Measurements
*   ±8G full-scale range magnetometer with 0.4mG total RMS noise
*   3-Axis SiPhOG™
*   24 Total Sensor Channels
*   Safety Rated RTOS and CPU
*   RS-422 and UART

products.name: ANELLO Maritime INS
products.descriptor: 3-axis optical gyro INS for ASVs and AUVs in GPS-denied environments

evidence.snippet:
### ANELLO MARITIME INS
High-Performance INS for Autonomous Maritime Operations in GPS-Denied Environments

*   Reference-grade 100Hz position, velocity and attitude
*   3-axis SiPhOG™ with < 0.5º/hr unaided heading drift
*   Dual triple-frequency GNSS receivers with static heading capability
*   Resilience in heavy shock and vibration environments
*   Highly accurate dead reckoning solution
*   ANELLO AI Sensor Fusion Engine with GNSS spoofing detection

products.name: ANELLO CMOSS PNT A-100
products.descriptor: 3U-VPX CMOSS PNT card with optical gyro INS for military GPS-denied navigation

evidence.snippet:
ANELLO CMOSS PNT A-100
Long-Term Navigation in GPS-Denied using on-board Optical Gyroscope INS
ANELLO CMOSS PNT A-100

*   3U-VPX Standards-based CMOSS PNT Card
*   Internal Optical Gyro and 6-Axis Inertial Measurement Unit
*   GPS-Denied Dead-Reckoning
*   Automatic Zero-Touch Alignment, On-Board Sensor Fusion
*   Accurate in Severely Degraded and GPS-Denied Conditions
*   VICTORY Messaging, 1000BASE-KX Control Plane Ethernet
*   Standard Civilian GPS and Optional M-Code GPS
*   Front Panel USB-C Maintenance Port, Key Loading, and Status LEDs

products.notes: Datasheet available by request only (not public download); supports M-Code GPS and VICTORY messaging.

products.name: ANELLO Ground INS/ATAK Kit
products.descriptor: Optical gyro INS with ATAK interface for GPS-denied ground vehicle navigation

evidence.snippet:
### ANELLO GROUND INS/ATAK KIT
Real-Time Navigation In GPS-Denied Environments
\*Previously known as ANELLO GNSS INS/ATAK KIT

The ANELLO GROUND INS/ATAK Kit utilizes advanced optical gyroscope technology to deliver real time high-accuracy positioning in environments where GPS is unavailable. The kit is available now and can quickly be installed into any vehicle in under 20 minutes.

products.notes: Previously known as ANELLO GNSS INS/ATAK KIT. Page states 'available now'.

products.name: ANELLO Ground INS
products.descriptor: Optical gyro INS for long-term GNSS-denied autonomous ground navigation

evidence.snippet:
### ANELLO GROUND INS\*
High-Performance Optical Gyro INS for Autonomous Navigation on Every Terrain
\*Previously known as ANELLO GNSS INS

### KEY FEATURES
*   Reference-grade 100 Hz Position, Velocity and Attitude
*   < 0.5º/hr Unaided Heading Drift
*   Accurate in severe multipath and GNSS-denied
*   Dual 184-channel five constellation dual-band GNSS Receivers
*   GPS, Glonass, Galileo, Beidou (Compass), QZSS

products.notes: Previously known as ANELLO GNSS INS.

products.name: ANELLO Ground IMU
products.descriptor: Rugged optical gyro IMU for harsh-environment robotics and construction autonomy

evidence.snippet:
### ANELLO GROUND IMU\*
Rugged Optical Gyro IMU for Robotics and Construction Autonomy
\*Previously known as ANELLO IMU+

### KEY FEATURES
*   Complete 6 Degrees of Freedom Inertial System
*   AHRS functionality for real-time 3D orientation - roll/pitch/yaw
*   High-Performance ANELLO Optical Gyroscope for the Z axis
*   200 Hz Data Output Rate
*   Two RS-232 Interfaces
*   Small Form Factor < 10in3
*   Low Power Consumption of 2.5W
*   Wide Temperature Range of -40 to +70ºC

products.name: ANELLO Evaluation Kit
products.descriptor: GNSS/INS evaluation kit with optical gyro for development and field testing

evidence.snippet:
### ANELLO EVALUATION KIT
Test the Future of Navigation Today

### KEY FEATURES
*   Reference-grade 100 Hz Position, Velocity, and Attitude
*   < 0.5º/Hr Unaided Heading Drift
*   Accurate in severe multipath and GNSS denied
*   Dual 184-channel five constellation dual-band GNSS receivers
*   GPS, Glonass, Galileo, Beidou (Compass), QZSS
*   Reliable Autonomous Land Vehicles, Advanced ADAS Systems
